div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Argentina (Armour)
div.p: 566. Your 829, August 12, 9 p.m.Not printed. HardingWilliam Barclay Harding, vice president of the Defense Supplies Corporatión, a buying agency of the Federal Loan Agency. has discussed Argentina’s commercial aviation problems with PiñedoFederico Piñedo, formerly Argentine Minister of Finance. and a memorandum of conversationNot printed. is being forwarded to you by airmail.

It appears that SanaSociedad Argentina de Navegación Aérea. and CorporatiónCorporación Sudamericana de Servicios Aéreos. will merge and that AeropostaAeroposta Argentina. will be forced to join by reason of availability to the merged organizations of up-to-date American equipment.
It is understood that either Wilcox or Oscar Muller will be authorized to handle the financial arrangements on behalf of the Federal Loan Agency and that Piñedo will assist in effecting the merger.
